title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Atos India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Atos India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
